allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user' or obj.get\('role'\) in ['user','assistant']: content = obj.get\('content',''\) or obj.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(c['text'][:500]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(content[:500]\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\('/c/Users/violeta/.claude/projects/C--Users-violeta-Documents-DataHack2026-Retos-Reto-3/31a9724d-af96-4331-a689-3548ee87edc5.jsonl'\) as f: for line in f: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user' and 'message' in obj: content = obj['message'].get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'tool_result': for item in c.get\('content', []\): if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = item['text'] if len\(text\) > 200: print\('TOOL RESULT:', text[:2000]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
